Module com.example.escriturarapida
Package com.example.escriturarapida.model

Class GameModelAdapter

java.lang.Object
com.example.escriturarapida.model.GameModelAdapter
All Implemented Interfaces:
IGameModel
public class GameModelAdapter extends Object implements IGameModel
Adapter class that wraps GameModel and implements IGameModel. Follows the Adapter design pattern to decouple the game logic from its consumers, allowing substitution or extension without modifying existing code.

Usage example:

     IGameModel model = new GameModelAdapter(new GameModel());
     model.loadWords();
     String word = model.randomSelect();
Since:
2026

  • Field Details

    • gameModel

      private final GameModel gameModel
      The adaptee instance containing the real game logic.

  • Constructor Details

    • GameModelAdapter

      public GameModelAdapter(GameModel gameModel)
      Constructs a new adapter wrapping the given GameModel.
      Parameters:
      gameModel - the concrete game model to adapt; must not be null.

  • Method Details

    • loadWords

      public void loadWords()
      Loads the full word list into memory and shuffles it randomly. Must be called before any word selection is attempted.
      Specified by:
      loadWords in interface IGameModel

    • randomSelect

      public String randomSelect()
      Returns a randomly selected word from the current word list.
      Specified by:
      randomSelect in interface IGameModel
      Returns:
      a random word from the list.

    • validateWord

      public boolean validateWord(String written, String word)
      Validates whether the typed word matches the target word. Comparison is case-insensitive and ignores leading/trailing whitespace.
      Specified by:
      validateWord in interface IGameModel
      Parameters:
      written - the word typed by the player.
      word - the target word displayed on screen.
      Returns:
      true if the words match, false otherwise.

    • removeWord

      public void removeWord(String word)
      Removes a word from the active word list after it has been correctly answered.
      Specified by:
      removeWord in interface IGameModel
      Parameters:
      word - the word to remove from the list.

    • saveData

      public void saveData(int level, int seconds, int milliseconds)
      Saves the current game state for use across scenes.
      Specified by:
      saveData in interface IGameModel
      Parameters:
      level - the current player level.
      seconds - the remaining seconds when the game ended.
      milliseconds - the remaining milliseconds when the game ended.

    • resetData

      public void resetData()
      Resets all game state back to zero. Called when the player restarts or exits to the start screen.
      Specified by:
      resetData in interface IGameModel

    • getRandomPositiveMessage

      public String getRandomPositiveMessage()
      Returns a randomly selected positive feedback message.
      Specified by:
      getRandomPositiveMessage in interface IGameModel
      Returns:
      a random positive message string.

    • getRandomNegativeMessage

      public String getRandomNegativeMessage()
      Returns a randomly selected negative feedback message.
      Specified by:
      getRandomNegativeMessage in interface IGameModel
      Returns:
      a random negative message string.
